name_en: Premium Hardware Original Leather, New Autumn/Winter Baguette Chain Bag ~ Black
name_cn:
Premium Hardware Original Leather, New Autumn/Winter Baguette Chain Bag ~ Black
Made of soft and smooth calfskin, this bag stands out with exquisite details such as gold-plated hardware. The hardware letter logo highlights classic style.
Dimensions: W24×H14×D7.5cm
Number: 5BB266
